Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dyjero Corporations Officer Omar Foze Ennabe To Attend And Testify At Deposition And For Deposition Fees And Costs Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Andrea D. McGary of The McGary Law Firm (415.874.3500) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Kaleb A. Honey of the law offices of Kaleb A. Honey (949.720.7030) appears via telephone as counsel for defendant/opposing party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PLAINTIFF PAUL WELLER'S Motion For Order Compelling Defendant Dyjero Corporations Officer Omar Foze Ennabe To Attend And Testify At Deposition And For Deposition Fees And Costs Sanctions is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. The motion to compel is granted and the deposition of Omar Foze Ennabe is set for June 26, 2017 at 10:00 AM at 350 10th Avenue in San Diego, California. The motion as to fees and costs sanctions is DENIED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
